## Summary

Describe what changed and why.

## Testing

- [ ] `./gradlew build`
- [ ] Dedicated server test, if command/gameplay behavior changed
- [ ] Client without CraftLedger Jobs can still join, if metadata/networking changed

## Checklist

- [ ] Docs updated for command/config behavior changes
- [ ] Transaction-affecting behavior is logged
- [ ] Server-only compatibility preserved
- [ ] No release jar or generated build output committed
